prestazioni: Replace the stock ZMZ-24D (2.4L I4, 95 hp) with a fully built ZMZ-406.10 (2.3L I4, DOHC, 16-valve) from the GAZ-3110, featuring forged Mahle pistons (86.5mm bore), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft (86mm stroke) for a 2.5L displacement. Pair with a Garrett GT3071R turbo (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor) on a custom tubular manifold (304 stainless steel, equal-length primaries) and a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate. Fuel system upgrades include Bosch EV14 800cc injectors, a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and a custom ECU tune via SECU-3T standalone (Russian aftermarket ECU) with launch control and boost-by-gear mapping.

Swap the stock 4-speed manual transmission for a reinforced GAZ-31105 5-speed (from the Volga successor) with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm, 800Nm torque capacity). Replace the stock driveshaft with a custom one-piece 4130 chromoly unit and upgrade to GAZ-31029 (Volga 31029) CV axles with reinforced boots and polyurethane bushings.

Install a fully adjustable suspension setup using KW Variant 3 coilovers (80mm travel, 12-way rebound, 16-way compression damping) with custom spring rates (6kg/mm front, 5kg/mm rear). Replace stock bushings with polyurethane (Poliuretany Rossii) and add a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm, adjustable) and a custom rear sway bar (22mm, solid). Brake system upgrades include Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors front, 300mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines (Goodridge).
estetica: Replace the stock steel body with a custom widebody kit from Russian tuner 'Avto-R' (Volga 24 'Rally' kit), featuring fiberglass fenders (50mm wider front, 60mm wider rear), a carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct, and a custom front splitter (3D-printed ABS, 30mm overhang). Paint the car in a custom 'Soviet Racing Green' (RAL 6003) with matte black accents and gold pinstriping (hand-painted by 'Lakiernia Artystyczna').

Install a custom interior with Recaro SRD-E seats (retrimmed in Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts, Soviet red stitching) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, GAZ logo embroidered). Replace the stock dashboard with a custom carbon fiber unit featuring VDO gauges (3.5-inch boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR) and a digital speedometer (AEM X-Series). Add a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point, bolt-in) with harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.

Upgrade the lighting with Hella Rallye 4000 (7-inch, 100W H4 bulbs) in custom aluminum buckets (CNC-machined, anodized gold) and Cibie Oscar (5.75-inch, 55W H3) fog lights. Add a custom rear wing (carbon fiber, 3D-printed airfoil, 1200mm span, 200mm chord) mounted on aluminum pedestals (adjustable angle, -5° to +15°). Replace the stock wheels with custom 17x9 ET15 (front) and 17x10 ET0 (rear) BBS RS-GT (gold, 5x108 PCD) wrapped in Nokian Hakkapeliitta R5 (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear).
